title: Brent crude surpasses $90 and European stock markets fall as Iran-US conflict escalates
summary: Iranian attacks on oil tankers and military confrontations drive up crude and create uncertainty in markets, as the risk of a large-scale retaliation increases.

title: People's Bank of China keeps interest rates and loan prime rates unchanged
summary: The monetary authority decided not to change its reference rates in July, amid mixed signals from the Asian economy.

title: Andy Burnham takes office as British Prime Minister tasked with revitalizing economy and curbing youth exodus
summary: The new leader promises to 'rewire' the country, maintain the ban on licenses in the North Sea, and reverse the loss of young talent.

title: Ryanair's profit drops 34% in first quarter due to rise in jet fuel prices
summary: The low-cost airline saw its earnings hit by higher fuel costs, causing a drop in its share value.
